title: myoporum tenuifolium var. montanum
intro: Myoporum tenuifolium var. montanum is a variety of the Myoporum tenuifolium plant, commonly known as the dwarf myoporum or lemon myrtle. It is a shrub native to Australia, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, which contain essential oils and flavonoids. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may also help to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Myoporum tenuifolium var. montanum can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, and are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy practices.
